published.title: How to Add Battery-Powered mmWave Presence Sensors to Home Assistant via Matter & Thread (No Cloud)
targetKeywords: Matter over Thread mmWave presence sensor
published.metaDescription: Set up Aqara FP300 or Meross MS605 mmWave sensors over Thread in Home Assistant—fully local, zero cloud, step-by-step.
published.angle: The first wave of battery-powered Matter-over-Thread mmWave sensors (Aqara FP300, Meross MS605) just launched—show readers exactly how to pair them locally in Home Assistant using an OpenThread border router, with no cloud account required and no proprietary hub.
